# Retell custom functions (generated)

This file is regenerated by `npm run retell:setup` (or `writeGeneratedDocs`). URLs use your public `APP_BASE_URL`.

## Authentication

All endpoints require **one** of:

- `Authorization: Bearer <RETELL_TOOL_SHARED_SECRET>`
- `x-retell-tool-secret: <RETELL_TOOL_SHARED_SECRET>`

## Webhook (separate from tools)

- **POST** `https://handiness-imitate-settle.ngrok-free.dev/api/receptionist/providers/retell/webhook` — Retell server-to-server events (signed with `x-retell-signature`).

## get_receptionist_context

- **Purpose:** Load company name, policies, business hours, after-hours mode, and JSON hints from PlumberOS settings.
- **When to call:** Near the start of every call, before promising scheduling or policy.
- **HTTP:** `POST https://handiness-imitate-settle.ngrok-free.dev/api/receptionist/providers/retell/functions/get_receptionist_context`

### Request JSON schema (illustrative)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Retell call id for this conversation (preferred when available)."
    },
    "receptionist_call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PlumberOS receptionist_calls.id from registerPhoneCall metadata / dynamic variables."
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": true
}
```

### Response JSON schema (success envelope)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "ok": {
      "const": true
    },
    "context": {
      "type": "object"
    }
  }
}
```

### Example request

```json
{}
```

### Example success response

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "context": {
    "companyName": "Demo Plumbing",
    "afterHoursMode": "message",
    "disclosureEnabled": true
  }
}
```

## get_availability

- **Purpose:** Return deterministic suggested booking windows from PlumberOS (not a live calendar optimizer).
- **When to call:** Before offering specific callback or quote visit times.
- **HTTP:** `POST https://handiness-imitate-settle.ngrok-free.dev/api/receptionist/providers/retell/functions/get_availability`

### Request JSON schema (illustrative)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Retell call id for this conversation (preferred when available)."
    },
    "receptionist_call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PlumberOS receptionist_calls.id from registerPhoneCall metadata / dynamic variables."
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": true
}
```

### Response JSON schema (success envelope)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "ok": {
      "const": true
    },
    "availability": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "windows": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "object"
          }
        },
        "timezone": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

### Example request

```json
{}
```

### Example success response

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "availability": {
    "timezone": "America/Toronto",
    "windows": [
      {
        "label": "Tomorrow morning",
        "start": "2026-04-13T14:00:00.000Z",
        "end": "2026-04-13T15:00:00.000Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

## create_lead

- **Purpose:** Create a CRM lead from the current receptionist call and link it in SQLite.
- **When to call:** Caller is not ready to book but you have enough info for human follow-up.
- **HTTP:** `POST https://handiness-imitate-settle.ngrok-free.dev/api/receptionist/providers/retell/functions/create_lead`

### Request JSON schema (illustrative)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Retell call id for this conversation (preferred when available)."
    },
    "receptionist_call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PlumberOS receptionist_calls.id from registerPhoneCall metadata / dynamic variables."
    },
    "caller_name": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Caller full name."
    },
    "callerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for caller_name."
    },
    "phone": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Callback number in E.164 or readable form."
    },
    "callback_number": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for phone."
    },
    "address": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Service address."
    },
    "service_address": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for address."
    },
    "issue_type": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Short issue category."
    },
    "issue_description": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "What is happening."
    },
    "issue": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for issue_description."
    },
    "urgency": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Caller-reported urgency: low | medium | high | emergency."
    },
    "preferred_callback_window": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Agreed callback window text."
    },
    "preferred_visit_window": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Agreed on-site quote window text."
    }
  },
  "required": []
}
```

### Response JSON schema (success envelope)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "ok": {
      "const": true
    },
    "leadId": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "alreadyLinked": {
      "type": "boolean"
    }
  }
}
```

### Example request

```json
{
  "call_id": "call_live_abc123",
  "caller_name": "Jane Doe",
  "phone": "+14165550123",
  "address": "12 River Rd, Toronto",
  "issue_description": "Slow drain in kitchen sink",
  "urgency": "low"
}
```

### Example success response

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "leadId": "lead_xyz",
  "alreadyLinked": false
}
```

## book_callback

- **Purpose:** Book a callback (job) from extracted + call data in PlumberOS.
- **When to call:** After caller confirms callback window and contact details.
- **HTTP:** `POST https://handiness-imitate-settle.ngrok-free.dev/api/receptionist/providers/retell/functions/book_callback`

### Request JSON schema (illustrative)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Retell call id for this conversation (preferred when available)."
    },
    "receptionist_call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PlumberOS receptionist_calls.id from registerPhoneCall metadata / dynamic variables."
    },
    "caller_name": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Caller full name."
    },
    "callerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for caller_name."
    },
    "phone": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Callback number in E.164 or readable form."
    },
    "callback_number": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for phone."
    },
    "address": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Service address."
    },
    "service_address": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for address."
    },
    "issue_type": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Short issue category."
    },
    "issue_description": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "What is happening."
    },
    "issue": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for issue_description."
    },
    "urgency": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Caller-reported urgency: low | medium | high | emergency."
    },
    "preferred_callback_window": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Agreed callback window text."
    },
    "preferred_visit_window": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Agreed on-site quote window text."
    }
  }
}
```

### Response JSON schema (success envelope)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "ok": {
      "const": true
    },
    "bookingId": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "jobId": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  }
}
```

### Example request

```json
{
  "call_id": "call_live_abc123",
  "preferred_callback_window": "Tomorrow between 9 and 11 a.m.",
  "phone": "+14165550123"
}
```

### Example success response

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "bookingId": "b_1",
  "jobId": "j_1"
}
```

## book_quote_visit

- **Purpose:** Book an on-site quote/estimate visit (job) from call data.
- **When to call:** After caller confirms visit window and service address.
- **HTTP:** `POST https://handiness-imitate-settle.ngrok-free.dev/api/receptionist/providers/retell/functions/book_quote_visit`

### Request JSON schema (illustrative)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Retell call id for this conversation (preferred when available)."
    },
    "receptionist_call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PlumberOS receptionist_calls.id from registerPhoneCall metadata / dynamic variables."
    },
    "caller_name": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Caller full name."
    },
    "callerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for caller_name."
    },
    "phone": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Callback number in E.164 or readable form."
    },
    "callback_number": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for phone."
    },
    "address": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Service address."
    },
    "service_address": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for address."
    },
    "issue_type": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Short issue category."
    },
    "issue_description": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "What is happening."
    },
    "issue": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for issue_description."
    },
    "urgency": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Caller-reported urgency: low | medium | high | emergency."
    },
    "preferred_callback_window": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Agreed callback window text."
    },
    "preferred_visit_window": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Agreed on-site quote window text."
    }
  }
}
```

### Response JSON schema (success envelope)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "ok": {
      "const": true
    },
    "bookingId": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "jobId": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  }
}
```

### Example request

```json
{
  "call_id": "call_live_abc123",
  "preferred_visit_window": "Thursday afternoon",
  "address": "44 Maple Ave",
  "issue_description": "Water heater leaking",
  "urgency": "high"
}
```

### Example success response

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "bookingId": "b_2",
  "jobId": "j_2"
}
```

## flag_emergency

- **Purpose:** Mark the receptionist call as emergency for dispatch prioritization.
- **When to call:** Active flooding, burst pipe, no water, sewer backup, or similar urgent situations.
- **HTTP:** `POST https://handiness-imitate-settle.ngrok-free.dev/api/receptionist/providers/retell/functions/flag_emergency`

### Request JSON schema (illustrative)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Retell call id for this conversation (preferred when available)."
    },
    "receptionist_call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PlumberOS receptionist_calls.id from registerPhoneCall metadata / dynamic variables."
    }
  }
}
```

### Response JSON schema (success envelope)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "ok": {
      "const": true
    },
    "flagged": {
      "const": true
    }
  }
}
```

### Example request

```json
{
  "call_id": "call_live_abc123"
}
```

### Example success response

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "flagged": true
}
```

## mark_spam

- **Purpose:** Mark the call as spam / abuse in PlumberOS.
- **When to call:** Clear spam, harassment, or obvious wrong-number abuse.
- **HTTP:** `POST https://handiness-imitate-settle.ngrok-free.dev/api/receptionist/providers/retell/functions/mark_spam`

### Request JSON schema (illustrative)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Retell call id for this conversation (preferred when available)."
    },
    "receptionist_call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PlumberOS receptionist_calls.id from registerPhoneCall metadata / dynamic variables."
    }
  }
}
```

### Response JSON schema (success envelope)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "ok": {
      "const": true
    },
    "marked": {
      "const": true
    }
  }
}
```

### Example request

```json
{
  "call_id": "call_live_abc123"
}
```

### Example success response

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "marked": true
}
```

## end_call_notes

- **Purpose:** Append a lightweight internal note to PlumberOS receptionist_events.
- **When to call:** Optional short internal summary before ending the call.
- **HTTP:** `POST https://handiness-imitate-settle.ngrok-free.dev/api/receptionist/providers/retell/functions/end_call_notes`

### Request JSON schema (illustrative)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Retell call id for this conversation (preferred when available)."
    },
    "receptionist_call_id": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PlumberOS receptionist_calls.id from registerPhoneCall metadata / dynamic variables."
    },
    "notes": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "summary": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Alias for notes."
    }
  }
}
```

### Response JSON schema (success envelope)

```json
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "ok": {
      "const": true
    },
    "logged": {
      "const": true
    }
  }
}
```

### Example request

```json
{
  "call_id": "call_live_abc123",
  "notes": "Caller will email photos of leak"
}
```

### Example success response

```json
{
  "ok": true,
  "logged": true
}
```

## Errors

Failed tool calls return JSON such as `{ "ok": false, "error": { "code": "...", "message": "..." } }` with 4xx status.
